description: Execute historical archive consolidation by moving 'audit/', 'qa/', 'release/', and 'retros/' into '.archive/' and generating a manifest mapping.
scope: Use 'git mv' to relocate the four historical directories to '.archive/'. Create '.archive/README.md' to document the mapping of historical paths to their new locations, preserving auditability and readability for reviewers and orchestrators.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO deletion of evidence. NO rewriting of historical markdown content to 'fix' paths. NO relocation of 'tasks/', 'workflow/', or 'src/'. NO expansion to docs center restructuring, bootstrap work, or state/framework separation.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify or delete historical markdown content.
Executing without an approved M2 contract.
